nodes.label: container-azul fuerte.svg
nodes.summary: SVG icon (96x96) depicting a shipping container in dark/strong blue tones. EXTRACTED.

nodes.label: Dark Blue Shipping Container Icon
nodes.summary: Flat illustration of a shipping container with corrugated vertical ribs (10 ribs) and two bottom feet/supports. EXTRACTED from SVG path structure.

nodes.label: Strong Blue Color Palette
nodes.summary: Uses fills #5247A7 (main body purple-blue), #3C388E (vertical rib shadows), and #221B5E (feet/supports). Indicates a 'strong'/saturated blue-violet variant. EXTRACTED.

nodes.label: Corrugated Container Ribs
nodes.summary: Ten repeating vertical rib paths (translate x=15,23,31,39,47,55,63,71,79) simulate the corrugated metal panels of a real shipping container. EXTRACTED.

nodes.label: Container Base Feet
nodes.summary: Two small darker rectangles at translate(26,72) and translate(60,72) representing the container's base supports/feet. EXTRACTED.

nodes.label: ACSD Container UI Asset (Selected/Active State)
nodes.summary: Likely the 'active/selected/hovered' visual state of a container icon in the ACSD app (the 'fuerte'/strong-blue variant complementing a lighter default container icon). Used to represent containers in the shipping/customs domain UI. INFERRED from filename ('azul fuerte' = strong blue) and ACSD project context.

nodes.label: Shipping Container (Domain Concept)
nodes.summary: The icon visually represents the real-world shipping/cargo container entity, a core domain object of the ACSD application. INFERRED.
